remarks: Brand-New Residences at The Wilton Center Lofts - Limited Availability. Now offering 2 MONTHS FREE with a one-year lease a significant savings opportunity on an already exceptional value. Only 5 units remaining and offered on a first-come, first-served basis, a rare opportunity to secure a brand-new apartment at below-market pricing. Located in an unbeatable commuter setting, The Wilton Center Lofts is just a 7-minute walk to the Metro-North train and a quick 3-minute drive to major routes, making daily travel effortless. Experience elevated living in these thoughtfully designed, brand-new homes offering a unique blend of style, comfort, and value. This spacious 935-square-foot one-bedroom + den/office residence is designed by the award-winning Granoff Architects, featuring timeless design and high-end finishes throughout. Highlights include: 9-foot ceilings and oversized windows for abundant natural light, Gourmet kitchen with quartz countertops, stainless steel BOSCH appliances, and custom cabinetry Wood-grain style flooring throughout Spa-inspired bathroom and large walk-in closets, In-unit washer and dryer for everyday convenience Residents also enjoy access to a fitness center and tenant lounge, enhancing the overall lifestyle experience. Most qualified applicants are pleasantly surprised to learn they meet the guidelines. Inquire today for income guidelines and availability, these final residences will not last.
